description: A horizontal graphic built from an event photograph with a large text overlay. The photo, shot in a dim industrial hall, shows Donald Trump at left in a dark navy suit with a red tie, pumping his fist, while a crowd of workers in orange high-visibility jackets and white hard hats fills the right side, many holding up phones; a blue podium and a blue banner reading 'THE GOLDEN AGE' (and partial 'AMERICAN JOBS') appear among the crowd. Overlaid across the top in large distressed white capitals is '115,000' with 'JOBS ADDED' beneath it in large gold/yellow capitals. The lighting is high-contrast.
notable_text: 115,000 JOBS ADDED / THE GOLDEN AGE / AMERICAN JOBS
